summary: Live-applied ADR 0313 from the dedicated workstream branch by converging the interactive ops portal runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, republishing the generated docs and changelog portals through the shared NGINX edge, and preserving the failure-to-fix evidence for the Docker bridge-chain recovery gap and the runtime image-layout import regression that surfaced during the replay.

verification.observed: `pytest tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py -q` returned `28 passed in 2.14s` after the runtime image-layout import fix.

`pytest tests/test_docs_site.py tests/test_ops_portal.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_changelog_portal.py tests/test_ops_portal_playbook.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py -q` returned `51 passed in 54.36s`.
The direct branch-local replay captured in `2026-04-02-ws-0313-ops-portal-direct-replay-r8.txt` finished cleanly with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=185 changed=12 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36`.

The running `ops-portal` container on `docker-runtime-lv3` is healthy, `/health` returns `{"status":"ok"}`, and the live root page contains `Contextual Help`, `Escalation Path`, `Live apply`, `Runtime Assurance`, and `Application Launcher`.
`make deploy-docs-portal` republished the generated docs and changelog portals with final recap `nginx-lv3 : ok=86 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=18`.

verification.check: Published artifact parity and public redirects
verification.observed: The generated docs and changelog `index.html` digests match `/var/www/lv3-generated/docs-portal/index.html` and `/var/www/lv3-generated/changelog-portal/index.html`, while `https://ops.example.com/`, `https://docs.example.com/`, and `https://changelog.example.com/` all return unauthenticated `302` redirects to `/oauth2/sign_in`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-portals`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the final branch-local tree.

notes: This branch-local receipt preserves the live replay before the exact-main integration step updates protected release and canonical-truth surfaces.

The earlier failed direct replays are intentionally retained because they exposed real platform defects: Docker bridge chains could disappear after nftables evaluation, and the mirrored ops-portal runtime tree imported `platform.datetime_compat` even though the isolated image layout does not ship the repo `platform` package.

As of 2026-04-02, `origin/main` is already ahead of this worktree at repository version `0.177.137` and platform version `0.130.86`; the final merge still has to replay ADR 0313 on that lineage before pushing `origin/main`.
